ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the neighborhood */,
  "RM" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "LSTAT" REAL /* Percentage of lower status of the population */,
  "RAD" INTEGER /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "CRIM" REAL /* Per capita crime rate by town */,
  "PTRATIO" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "DIS" REAL /* Weighted distances to five Boston employment centers */,
  "ZN" REAL /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq. ft. */,
  "NOX" REAL /* Nitric oxides concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "CHAS" INTEGER /* Charles River dummy variable (1 if tract bounds river; 0 otherwise) */,
  "B" REAL /* Black/White ratio by town */,
  "TAX" INTEGER /* Full value property tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "INDUS" REAL /* Proportion of non-retail business acres per town */,
  "AGE" REAL /* Age of the property (in years) */,
  "MEDV" REAL /* Median value of owner-occupied homes in $1000s */,
  "group" INTEGER /* Grouping identifier for properties */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family, apartment, condo) */,
  "property_size" REAL /* Size of the property in square feet */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "renovation_year" INTEGER /* Year of the last major renovation */,
  "energy_efficiency" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the property */,
  "environmental_factors" TEXT /* Summary of environmental factors affecting the property */,
  "proximity_to_employment_centers" REAL /* Distance to the nearest employment center in miles */,
  "proximity_to_public_transport" REAL /* Distance to the nearest public transport in miles */,
  "proximity_to_schools" REAL /* Distance to the nearest school in miles */,
  "proximity_to_parks" REAL /* Distance to the nearest park in miles */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date the property was last sold */,
  "last_sold_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was last sold */,
  "current_owner" TEXT /* Name of the current owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property ID */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the neighborhood */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties in the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in average price from previous year */,
  "number_of_transactions" INTEGER /* Number of property transactions in the neighborhood */,
  "average_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Average number of days properties were on the market */,
  "inventory_levels" INTEGER /* Number of properties currently on the market */,
  "median_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Median number of days properties were on the market */,
  "median_price_per_square_foot" REAL /* Median price per square foot of properties in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Average crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income level in the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the residents */,
  "public_school_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of public schools in the neighborhood */,
  "private_school_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of private schools in the neighborhood */,
  "public_transport_connections" INTEGER /* Number of public transport connections */,
  "green_space_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of green space in the neighborhood */,
  "commercial_activity" TEXT /* Summary of commercial activity in the neighborhood */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the neighborhood */,
  "median_rent" REAL /* Median rent in the neighborhood */,
  "property_tax_rate" REAL /* Property tax rate in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, investor, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., email notifications, dashboard settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
